verses.kjv: ADAM, Sheth, Enosh,
verses.bsb: Adam, Seth, Enosh,

verses.kjv: Kenan, Mahalaleel, Jered,
verses.bsb: Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared,

verses.kjv: Henoch, Methuselah, Lamech,
verses.bsb: Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech.

verses.kjv: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
verses.bsb: The sons of Noah:  Shem, Ham, and Japheth.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Japheth; Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.
verses.bsb: The sons of Japheth:   Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Gomer; Ashchenaz, and Riphath, and Togarmah.
verses.bsb: The sons of Gomer: Ashkenaz, Riphath, and Togarmah.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Javan; Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.
verses.bsb: And the sons of Javan: Elishah, Tarshish, the Kittites, and the Rodanites.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Ham; Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.
verses.bsb: The sons of Ham:   Cush, Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raamah, and Sabtecha. And the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.
verses.bsb: The sons of Cush: Seba, Havilah, Sabta, Raamah, and Sabteca.   The sons of Raamah: Sheba and Dedan.

verses.kjv: And Cush begat Nimrod: he began to be mighty upon the earth.
verses.bsb: Cush was the father of Nimrod, who began to be a mighty one on the earth.

verses.kjv: And Mizraim begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,
verses.bsb: Mizraim was the father of the Ludites, the Anamites, the Lehabites, the Naphtuhites,

verses.kjv: And Pathrusim, and Casluhim, (of whom came the Philistines,) and Caphthorim.
verses.bsb: the Pathrusites, the Casluhites (from whom the Philistines came), and the Caphtorites.

verses.kjv: And Canaan begat Zidon his firstborn, and Heth,
verses.bsb: And Canaan was the father of Sidon his firstborn, and of the Hittites,

verses.kjv: The Jebusite also, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite,
verses.bsb: the Jebusites, the Amorites, the Girgashites,

verses.kjv: And the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite,
verses.bsb: the Hivites, the Arkites, the Sinites,

verses.kjv: And the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.
verses.bsb: the Arvadites, the Zemarites, and the Hamathites.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Shem; Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.
verses.bsb: The sons of Shem:   Elam, Asshur, Arphaxad, Lud, and Aram.   The sons of Aram: Uz, Hul, Gether, and Meshech.

verses.kjv: And Arphaxad begat Shelah, and Shelah begat Eber.
verses.bsb: Arphaxad was the father of Shelah, and Shelah was the father of Eber.

verses.kjv: And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg; because in his days the earth was divided: and his brother’s name was Joktan.
verses.bsb: Two sons were born to Eber: One was named Peleg, because in his days the earth was divided, and his brother was named Joktan.

verses.kjv: And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,
verses.bsb: And Joktan was the father of Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,

verses.kjv: Hadoram also, and Uzal, and Diklah,
verses.bsb: Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah,

verses.kjv: And Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba,
verses.bsb: Obal, Abimael, Sheba,

verses.kjv: And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.
verses.bsb: Ophir, Havilah, and Jobab. All these were sons of Joktan.

verses.kjv: ¶ Shem, Arphaxad, Shelah,
verses.bsb: So from Shem came Arphaxad, Shelah,

verses.kjv: Eber, Peleg, Reu,
verses.bsb: Eber, Peleg, Reu,

verses.kjv: Serug, Nahor, Terah,
verses.bsb: Serug, Nahor, Terah,

verses.kjv: Abram; the same is Abraham.
verses.bsb: and Abram (that is, Abraham).

verses.kjv: The sons of Abraham; Isaac, and Ishmael.
verses.bsb: The sons of Abraham were Isaac and Ishmael.

verses.kjv: ¶ These are their generations: The firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth; then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,
verses.bsb: These are their genealogies:

verses.kjv: Mishma, and Dumah, Massa, Hadad, and Tema,
verses.bsb: Nebaioth the firstborn of Ishmael, then Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam, Mishma, Dumah, Massa, Hadad, Tema,

verses.kjv: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These are the sons of Ishmael.
verses.bsb: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These were the sons of Ishmael.

verses.kjv: ¶ Now the sons of Keturah, Abraham’s concubine: she bare Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sons of Jokshan; Sheba, and Dedan.
verses.bsb: The sons born to Keturah, Abraham’s concubine:   Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, and Shuah.   The sons of Jokshan:   Sheba and Dedan.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Midian; Ephah, and Epher, and Henoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these are the sons of Keturah.
verses.bsb: The sons of Midian:   Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida, and Eldaah.   All of these were Keturah’s sons.

verses.kjv: And Abraham begat Isaac. The sons of Isaac; Esau and Israel.
verses.bsb: Abraham was the father of Isaac. The sons of Isaac:   Esau and Israel.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Esau; Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.
verses.bsb: The sons of Esau:   Eliphaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jalam, and Korah.

verses.kjv: The sons of Eliphaz; Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.
verses.bsb: The sons of Eliphaz: Teman, Omar, Zepho, Gatam, and Kenaz; and by Timna, Amalek.

verses.kjv: The sons of Reuel; Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
verses.bsb: The sons of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Seir; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.
verses.bsb: The sons of Seir:   Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer, and Dishan.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Lotan; Hori, and Homam: and Timna was Lotan’s sister.
verses.bsb: The sons of Lotan: Hori and Homam. Timna was Lotan’s sister.

verses.kjv: The sons of Shobal; Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon; Aiah, and Anah.
verses.bsb: The sons of Shobal: Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shepho, and Onam.   The sons of Zibeon: Aiah and Anah.

verses.kjv: The sons of Anah; Dishon. And the sons of Dishon; Amram, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.
verses.bsb: The son of Anah: Dishon.   The sons of Dishon: Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran, and Cheran.

verses.kjv: The sons of Ezer; Bilhan, and Zavan, and Jakan. The sons of Dishan; Uz, and Aran.
verses.bsb: The sons of Ezer: Bilhan, Zaavan, and Akan.   The sons of Dishan: Uz and Aran.

verses.kjv: ¶ Now these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom before any king reigned over the children of Israel; Bela the son of Beor: and the name of his city was Dinhabah.
verses.bsb: These are the kings who reigned in the land of Edom before any king reigned over the Israelites:  Bela son of Beor. His city was named Dinhabah.

verses.kjv: And when Bela was dead, Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.
verses.bsb: When Bela died, Jobab son of Zerah from Bozrah reigned in his place.

verses.kjv: And when Jobab was dead, Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his stead.
verses.bsb: When Jobab died, Husham from the land of the Temanites reigned in his place.

verses.kjv: And when Husham was dead, Hadad the son of Bedad, which smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Avith.
verses.bsb: When Husham died, Hadad son of Bedad, who defeated Midian in the country of Moab, reigned in his place. And the name of his city was Avith.

verses.kjv: And when Hadad was dead, Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.
verses.bsb: When Hadad died, Samlah from Masrekah reigned in his place.

verses.kjv: And when Samlah was dead, Shaul of Rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead.
verses.bsb: When Samlah died, Shaul from Rehoboth on the Euphrates reigned in his place.

verses.kjv: And when Shaul was dead, Baal-hanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.
verses.bsb: When Shaul died, Baal-hanan son of Achbor reigned in his place.

verses.kjv: And when Baal-hanan was dead, Hadad reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Pai; and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.
verses.bsb: When Baal-hanan died, Hadad reigned in his place. His city was named Pau, and his wife’s name was Mehetabel daughter of Matred, the daughter of Me-zahab.

verses.kjv: ¶ Hadad died also. And the dukes of Edom were; duke Timnah, duke Aliah, duke Jetheth,
verses.bsb: Then Hadad died.   Now the chiefs of Edom were Timna, Alvah, Jetheth,

verses.kjv: Duke Aholibamah, duke Elah, duke Pinon,
verses.bsb: Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon,

verses.kjv: Duke Kenaz, duke Teman, duke Mibzar,
verses.bsb: Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar,

verses.kjv: Duke Magdiel, duke Iram. These are the dukes of Edom.
verses.bsb: Magdiel, and Iram. These were the chiefs of Edom.

verses.kjv: THESE are the sons of Israel; Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun,
verses.bsb: These were the sons of Israel:

verses.kjv: Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.
verses.bsb: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Zebulun, Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah: which three were born unto him of the daughter of Shua the Canaanitess. And Er, the firstborn of Judah, was evil in the sight of the Lord; and he slew him.
verses.bsb: The sons of Judah:   Er, Onan, and Shelah. These three were born to him by Bath-shua the Canaanite. Er, Judah’s firstborn, was wicked in the sight of the LORD, who put him to death.

verses.kjv: And Tamar his daughter in law bare him Pharez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah were five.
verses.bsb: Tamar, Judah’s daughter-in-law, bore to him Perez and Zerah. Judah had five sons in all.

verses.kjv: The sons of Pharez; Hezron, and Hamul.
verses.bsb: The sons of Perez:   Hezron and Hamul.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Zerah; Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara: five of them in all.
verses.bsb: The sons of Zerah:   Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Calcol, and Dara—five in all.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Carmi; Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in the thing accursed.
verses.bsb: The son of Carmi:   Achar, who brought trouble upon Israel by violating the ban on devoted things.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Ethan; Azariah.
verses.bsb: The son of Ethan:   Azariah.

verses.kjv: The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him; Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.
verses.bsb: The sons who were born to Hezron:   Jerahmeel, Ram, and Caleb.

verses.kjv: And Ram begat Amminadab; and Amminadab begat Nahshon, prince of the children of Judah;
verses.bsb: Ram was the father of Amminadab, and Amminadab was the father of Nahshon, a leader of the descendants of Judah.

verses.kjv: And Nahshon begat Salma, and Salma begat Boaz,
verses.bsb: Nahshon was the father of Salmon, and Salmon was the father of Boaz.

verses.kjv: And Boaz begat Obed, and Obed begat Jesse,
verses.bsb: Boaz was the father of Obed, and Obed was the father of Jesse.

verses.kjv: ¶ And Jesse begat his firstborn Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimma the third,
verses.bsb: Jesse was the father of Eliab his firstborn; Abinadab was born second, Shimea third,

verses.kjv: Nethaneel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,
verses.bsb: Nethanel fourth, Raddai fifth,

verses.kjv: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh:
verses.bsb: Ozem sixth, and David seventh.

verses.kjv: Whose sisters were Zeruiah, and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah; Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.
verses.bsb: Their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. And the three sons of Zeruiah were Abishai, Joab, and Asahel.

verses.kjv: And Abigail bare Amasa: and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmeelite.
verses.bsb: Abigail was the mother of Amasa, whose father was Jether the Ishmaelite.

verses.kjv: ¶ And Caleb the son of Hezron begat children of Azubah his wife, and of Jerioth: her sons are these; Jesher, and Shobab, and Ardon.
verses.bsb: Caleb son of Hezron had children by his wife Azubah and by Jerioth. These were the sons of Azubah: Jesher, Shobab, and Ardon.

verses.kjv: And when Azubah was dead, Caleb took unto him Ephrath, which bare him Hur.
verses.bsb: When Azubah died, Caleb married Ephrath, who bore to him Hur.

verses.kjv: And Hur begat Uri, and Uri begat Bezaleel.
verses.bsb: Hur was the father of Uri, and Uri was the father of Bezalel.

verses.kjv: ¶ And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was threescore years old; and she bare him Segub.
verses.bsb: Later, Hezron slept with the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead. He had married her when he was sixty years old, and she bore to him Segub.

verses.kjv: And Segub begat Jair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.
verses.bsb: Segub was the father of Jair, who had twenty-three cities in the land of Gilead.

verses.kjv: And he took Geshur, and Aram, with the towns of Jair, from them, with Kenath, and the towns thereof, even threescore cities. All these belonged to the sons of Machir the father of Gilead.
verses.bsb: But Geshur and Aram captured Havvoth-jair, along with Kenath and its sixty surrounding villages. All these were descendants of Machir the father of Gilead.

verses.kjv: And after that Hezron was dead in Caleb-ephratah, then Abiah Hezron’s wife bare him Ashur the father of Tekoa.
verses.bsb: After Hezron died in Caleb-ephrathah, his wife Abijah bore to him Ashhur the father of Tekoa.

verses.kjv: ¶ And the sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were, Ram the firstborn, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, and Ahijah.
verses.bsb: The sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron:

verses.kjv: Jerahmeel had also another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.
verses.bsb: Ram his firstborn, Bunah, Oren, Ozem, and Ahijah. Jerahmeel had another wife named Atarah, who was the mother of Onam.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Ram the firstborn of Jerahmeel were, Maaz, and Jamin, and Eker.
verses.bsb: The sons of Ram the firstborn of Jerahmeel:   Maaz, Jamin, and Eker.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Onam were, Shammai, and Jada. And the sons of Shammai; Nadab, and Abishur.
verses.bsb: The sons of Onam:   Shammai and Jada.   The sons of Shammai:

verses.kjv: And the name of the wife of Abishur was Abihail, and she bare him Ahban, and Molid.
verses.bsb: Nadab and Abishur. Abishur’s wife was named Abihail, and she bore to him Ahban and Molid.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Nadab; Seled, and Appaim: but Seled died without children.
verses.bsb: The sons of Nadab:   Seled and Appaim. Seled died without children.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Appaim; Ishi. And the sons of Ishi; Sheshan. And the children of Sheshan; Ahlai.
verses.bsb: The son of Appaim:   Ishi.   The son of Ishi:   Sheshan.   The son of Sheshan:   Ahlai.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Jada the brother of Shammai; Jether, and Jonathan: and Jether died without children.
verses.bsb: The sons of Jada the brother of Shammai:   Jether and Jonathan. Jether died without children.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Jonathan; Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.
verses.bsb: The sons of Jonathan:   Peleth and Zaza.   These were the descendants of Jerahmeel.

verses.kjv: ¶ Now Sheshan had no sons, but daughters. And Sheshan had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha.
verses.bsb: Sheshan had no sons, but only daughters; but he did have an Egyptian servant named Jarha.

verses.kjv: And Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant to wife; and she bare him Attai.
verses.bsb: Sheshan gave his daughter in marriage to his servant Jarha, and she bore to him Attai.

verses.kjv: And Attai begat Nathan, and Nathan begat Zabad,
verses.bsb: Attai was the father of Nathan, Nathan was the father of Zabad,

verses.kjv: And Zabad begat Ephlal, and Ephlal begat Obed,
verses.bsb: Zabad was the father of Ephlal, Ephlal was the father of Obed,

verses.kjv: And Obed begat Jehu, and Jehu begat Azariah,
verses.bsb: Obed was the father of Jehu, Jehu was the father of Azariah,

verses.kjv: And Azariah begat Helez, and Helez begat Eleasah,
verses.bsb: Azariah was the father of Helez, Helez was the father of Elasah,

verses.kjv: And Eleasah begat Sisamai, and Sisamai begat Shallum,
verses.bsb: Elasah was the father of Sismai, Sismai was the father of Shallum,

verses.kjv: And Shallum begat Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begat Elishama.
verses.bsb: Shallum was the father of Jekamiah, and Jekamiah was the father of Elishama.

verses.kjv: ¶ Now the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were, Mesha his firstborn, which was the father of Ziph; and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.
verses.bsb: The sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel:   Mesha his firstborn, who was the father of Ziph, and Mareshah his second son, who was the father of Hebron.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Hebron; Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.
verses.bsb: The sons of Hebron:

verses.kjv: And Shema begat Raham, the father of Jorkoam: and Rekem begat Shammai.
verses.bsb: Korah, Tappuah, Rekem, and Shema. Shema was the father of Raham the father of Jorkeam, and Rekem was the father of Shammai.

verses.kjv: And the son of Shammai was Maon: and Maon was the father of Beth-zur.
verses.bsb: The son of Shammai was Maon, and Maon was the father of Beth-zur.

verses.kjv: And Ephah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Haran, and Moza, and Gazez: and Haran begat Gazez.
verses.bsb: Caleb’s concubine Ephah was the mother of Haran, Moza, and Gazez. Haran was the father of Gazez.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Jahdai; Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.
verses.bsb: The sons of Jahdai:   Regem, Jotham, Geshan, Pelet, Ephah, and Shaaph.

verses.kjv: Maachah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Sheber, and Tirhanah.
verses.bsb: Caleb’s concubine Maacah was the mother of Sheber and Tirhanah.

verses.kjv: She bare also Shaaph the father of Madmannah, Sheva the father of Machbenah, and the father of Gibea: and the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.
verses.bsb: She was also the mother of Shaaph father of Madmannah, and of Sheva father of Machbenah and Gibea. Caleb’s daughter was Acsah.

verses.kjv: ¶ These were the sons of Caleb the son of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah; Shobal the father of Kirjath-jearim,
verses.bsb: These were the descendants of Caleb.   The sons of Hur the firstborn of Ephrathah:

verses.kjv: Salma the father of Beth-lehem, Hareph the father of Beth-gader.
verses.bsb: Shobal the father of Kiriath-jearim, Salma the father of Bethlehem, and Hareph the father of Beth-gader.

verses.kjv: And Shobal the father of Kirjath-jearim had sons; Haroeh, and half of the Manahethites.
verses.bsb: These were the descendants of Shobal the father of Kiriath-jearim:

verses.kjv: And the families of Kirjath-jearim; the Ithrites, and the Puhites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; of them came the Zareathites, and the Eshtaulites.
verses.bsb: Haroeh, half the Manahathites, and the clans of Kiriath-jearim—the Ithrites, Puthites, Shumathites, and Mishraites. From these descended the Zorathites and Eshtaolites.

verses.kjv: The sons of Salma; Beth-lehem, and the Netophathites, Ataroth, the house of Joab, and half of the Manahethites, the Zorites.
verses.bsb: The descendants of Salma:

verses.kjv: And the families of the scribes which dwelt at Jabez; the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and Suchathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hemath, the father of the house of Rechab.
verses.bsb: Bethlehem, the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-joab, half the Manahathites, the Zorites, and the clans of the scribes who lived at Jabez—the Tirathites, Shimeathites, and Sucathites. These are the Kenites who came from Hammath, the father of the house of Rechab.

verses.kjv: NOW these were the sons of David, which were born unto him in Hebron; the firstborn Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess; the second Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitess:
verses.bsb: These were the sons of David who were born to him in Hebron:  The firstborn was Amnon by Ahinoam of Jezreel;   the second was Daniel by Abigail of Carmel;

verses.kjv: The third, Absalom the son of Maachah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur: the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith:
verses.bsb: the third was Absalom the son of Maacah daughter of King Talmai of Geshur;   the fourth was Adonijah the son of Haggith;

verses.kjv: The fifth, Shephatiah of Abital: the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife.
verses.bsb: the fifth was Shephatiah by Abital;   and the sixth was Ithream by his wife Eglah.

verses.kjv: These six were born unto him in Hebron; and there he reigned seven years and six months: and in Jerusalem he reigned thirty and three years.
verses.bsb: These six sons were born to David in Hebron, where he reigned seven years and six months.   And David reigned in Jerusalem thirty-three years,

verses.kjv: And these were born unto him in Jerusalem; Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon, four, of Bath-shua the daughter of Ammiel:
verses.bsb: and these sons were born to him in Jerusalem:  Shimea, Shobab, Nathan, and Solomon. These four were born to him by Bathsheba daughter of Ammiel.

verses.kjv: Ibhar also, and Elishama, and Eliphelet,
verses.bsb: David’s other sons were Ibhar, Elishua, Eliphelet,

verses.kjv: And Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia,
verses.bsb: Nogah, Nepheg, Japhia,

verses.kjv: And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.
verses.bsb: Elishama, Eliada, and Eliphelet—nine in all.

verses.kjv: These were all the sons of David, beside the sons of the concubines, and Tamar their sister.
verses.bsb: These were all the sons of David, besides the sons by his concubines. And Tamar was their sister.

verses.kjv: ¶ And Solomon’s son was Rehoboam, Abia his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son,
verses.bsb: Solomon’s son was Rehoboam:

verses.kjv: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,
verses.bsb: Abijah was his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son, Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,

verses.kjv: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,
verses.bsb: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,

verses.kjv: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,
verses.bsb: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,

verses.kjv: Amon his son, Josiah his son.
verses.bsb: Amon his son, and Josiah his son.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Josiah were, the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.
verses.bsb: The sons of Josiah:   Johanan was the firstborn, Jehoiakim the second, Zedekiah the third, and Shallum the fourth.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.
verses.bsb: The successors of Jehoiakim:   Jeconiah his son, and Zedekiah.

verses.kjv: ¶ And the sons of Jeconiah; Assir, Salathiel his son,
verses.bsb: The descendants of Jeconiah the captive:

verses.kjv: Malchiram also, and Pedaiah, and Shenazar, Jecamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.
verses.bsb: Shealtiel his son, Malchiram, Pedaiah, Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Pedaiah were, Zerubbabel, and Shimei: and the sons of Zerubbabel; Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister:
verses.bsb: The sons of Pedaiah:   Zerubbabel and Shimei.   The children of Zerubbabel:

verses.kjv: And Hashubah, and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, Jushab-hesed, five.
verses.bsb: Meshullam and Hananiah, their sister Shelomith, and five others: Hashubah, Ohel, Berechiah, Hasadiah, and Jushab-hesed.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Hananiah; Pelatiah, and Jesaiah: the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shechaniah.
verses.bsb: The descendants of Hananiah:   Pelatiah, Jeshaiah, and the sons of Rephaiah, of Arnan, of Obadiah, and of Shecaniah.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Shechaniah; Shemaiah: and the sons of Shemaiah; Hattush, and Igeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.
verses.bsb: The six descendants of Shecaniah were Shemaiah and his sons:   Hattush, Igal, Bariah, Neariah, and Shaphat.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Neariah; Elioenai, and Hezekiah, and Azrikam, three.
verses.bsb: The sons of Neariah:   Elioenai, Hizkiah, and Azrikam—three in all.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Elioenai were, Hodaiah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Dalaiah, and Anani, seven.
verses.bsb: The sons of Elioenai:   Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah, and Anani—seven in all.

verses.kjv: THE sons of Judah; Pharez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.
verses.bsb: The descendants of Judah:  Perez, Hezron, Carmi, Hur, and Shobal.

verses.kjv: And Reaiah the son of Shobal begat Jahath; and Jahath begat Ahumai, and Lahad. These are the families of the Zorathites.
verses.bsb: Reaiah son of Shobal was the father of Jahath, and Jahath was the father of Ahumai and Lahad. These were the clans of the Zorathites.

verses.kjv: And these were of the father of Etam; Jezreel, and Ishma, and Idbash: and the name of their sister was Hazelelponi:
verses.bsb: These were the sons of Etam: Jezreel, Ishma, and Idbash. And their sister was named Hazzelelponi.

verses.kjv: And Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These are the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah, the father of Beth-lehem.
verses.bsb: Penuel was the father of Gedor, and Ezer was the father of Hushah.   These were the descendants of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah and the father of Bethlehem.

verses.kjv: ¶ And Ashur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.
verses.bsb: Ashhur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.

verses.kjv: And Naarah bare him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.
verses.bsb: Naarah bore to him Ahuzzam, Hepher, Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the descendants of Naarah.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Helah were, Zereth, and Jezoar, and Ethnan.
verses.bsb: The sons of Helah were Zereth, Zohar, Ethnan,

verses.kjv: And Coz begat Anub, and Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel the son of Harum.
verses.bsb: and Koz, who was the father of Anub and Zobebah and of the clans of Aharhel son of Harum.

verses.kjv: ¶ And Jabez was more honourable than his brethren: and his mother called his name Jabez, saying, Because I bare him with sorrow.
verses.bsb: Now Jabez was more honorable than his brothers. His mother had named him Jabez, saying, “Because I bore him in pain.”

verses.kjv: And Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying, Oh that thou wouldest bless me indeed, and enlarge my coast, and that thine hand might be with me, and that thou wouldest keep me from evil, that it may not grieve me! And God granted him that which he requested.
verses.bsb: And Jabez called out to the God of Israel, “If only You would bless me and enlarge my territory! May Your hand be with me and keep me from harm, so that I will be free from pain.”   And God granted the request of Jabez.

verses.kjv: ¶ And Chelub the brother of Shuah begat Mehir, which was the father of Eshton.
verses.bsb: Chelub the brother of Shuhah was the father of Mehir, who was the father of Eshton.

verses.kjv: And Eshton begat Beth-rapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Rechah.
verses.bsb: Eshton was the father of Beth-rapha, of Paseah, and of Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These were the men of Recah.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Kenaz; Othniel, and Seraiah: and the sons of Othniel; Hathath.
verses.bsb: The sons of Kenaz:   Othniel and Seraiah.   The sons of Othniel:   Hathath and Meonothai.

verses.kjv: And Meonothai begat Ophrah: and Seraiah begat Joab, the father of the valley of Charashim; for they were craftsmen.
verses.bsb: Meonothai was the father of Ophrah, and Seraiah was the father of Joab, the father of those living in Ge-harashim, which was given this name because its people were craftsmen.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh; Iru, Elah, and Naam: and the sons of Elah, even Kenaz.
verses.bsb: The sons of Caleb son of Jephunneh:   Iru, Elah, and Naam.   The son of Elah:   Kenaz.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Jehaleleel; Ziph, and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asareel.
verses.bsb: The sons of Jehallelel:   Ziph, Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Ezra were, Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon: and she bare Miriam, and Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa.
verses.bsb: The sons of Ezrah:   Jether, Mered, Epher, and Jalon.

verses.kjv: And his wife Jehudijah bare Jered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Socho, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah. And these are the sons of Bithiah the daughter of Pharaoh, which Mered took.
verses.bsb: And Mered’s wife Bithiah gave birth to Miriam, Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa. These were the children of Pharaoh’s daughter Bithiah.   Mered also took a Judean wife, who gave birth to Jered the father of Gedor, Heber the father of Soco, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah.

verses.kjv: And the sons of his wife Hodiah the sister of Naham, the father of Keilah the Garmite, and Eshtemoa the Maachathite.
verses.bsb: The sons of Hodiah’s wife, the sister of Naham, were the fathers of Keilah the Garmite and of Eshtemoa the Maacathite.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Shimon were, Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi were, Zoheth, and Ben-zoheth.
verses.bsb: The sons of Shimon:   Amnon, Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon.   The descendants of Ishi:   Zoheth and Ben-zoheth.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Shelah the son of Judah were, Er the father of Lecah, and Laadah the father of Mareshah, and the families of the house of them that wrought fine linen, of the house of Ashbea,
verses.bsb: The sons of Shelah son of Judah:

verses.kjv: And Jokim, and the men of Chozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who had the dominion in Moab, and Jashubi-lehem. And these are ancient things.
verses.bsb: Er the father of Lecah, Laadah the father of Mareshah and the clans of the linen workers at Beth-ashbea, Jokim, the men of Cozeba, and Joash and Saraph, who ruled in Moab and Jashubi-lehem. (These names are from ancient records.)

verses.kjv: These were the potters, and those that dwelt among plants and hedges: there they dwelt with the king for his work.
verses.bsb: These were the potters who lived at Netaim and Gederah. They lived there in the service of the king.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Simeon were, Nemuel, and Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, and Shaul:
verses.bsb: The descendants of Simeon:  Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, and Shaul.

verses.kjv: Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.
verses.bsb: The sons of Shaul:   Shallum, Mibsam, and Mishma.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Mishma; Hamuel his son, Zacchur his son, Shimei his son.
verses.bsb: The sons of Mishma:   Hammuel, Zaccur, and Shimei.

verses.kjv: And Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brethren had not many children, neither did all their family multiply, like to the children of Judah.
verses.bsb: Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters, but his brothers did not have many children, so their whole clan did not become as numerous as the sons of Judah.

verses.kjv: And they dwelt at Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-shual,
verses.bsb: They lived in Beersheba, Moladah, Hazar-shual,

verses.kjv: And at Bilhah, and at Ezem, and at Tolad,
verses.bsb: Bilhah, Ezem, Tolad,

verses.kjv: And at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag,
verses.bsb: Bethuel, Hormah, Ziklag,

verses.kjv: And at Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-susim, and at Beth-birei, and at Shaaraim. These were their cities unto the reign of David.
verses.bsb: Beth-marcaboth, Hazar-susim, Beth-biri, and Shaaraim. These were their cities until the reign of David.

verses.kjv: And their villages were, Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan, five cities:
verses.bsb: And their villages were Etam, Ain, Rimmon, Tochen, and Ashan—five towns—

verses.kjv: And all their villages that were round about the same cities, unto Baal. These were their habitations, and their genealogy.
verses.bsb: and all their surrounding villages as far as Baal. These were their settlements, and they kept a genealogical record:

verses.kjv: And Meshobab, and Jamlech, and Joshah the son of Amaziah,
verses.bsb: Meshobab, Jamlech, Joshah son of Amaziah,

verses.kjv: And Joel, and Jehu the son of Josibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel,
verses.bsb: Joel, Jehu son of Joshibiah (son of Seraiah, son of Asiel),

verses.kjv: And Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshohaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah,
verses.bsb: Elioenai, Jaakobah, Jeshohaiah, Asaiah, Adiel, Jesimiel, Benaiah,

verses.kjv: And Ziza the son of Shiphi, the son of Allon, the son of Jedaiah, the son of Shimri, the son of Shemaiah;
verses.bsb: and Ziza son of Shiphi (son of Allon, son of Jedaiah, son of Shimri, son of Shemaiah).

verses.kjv: These mentioned by their names were princes in their families: and the house of their fathers increased greatly.
verses.bsb: These men listed by name were the leaders of their clans. Their families increased greatly,

verses.kjv: ¶ And they went to the entrance of Gedor, even unto the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.
verses.bsb: and they journeyed to the entrance of Gedor, to the east side of the valley, in search of pasture for their flocks.

verses.kjv: And they found fat pasture and good, and the land was wide, and quiet, and peaceable; for they of Ham had dwelt there of old.
verses.bsb: There they found rich, good pasture, and the land was spacious, peaceful, and quiet; for some Hamites had lived there formerly.

verses.kjv: And these written by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and smote their tents, and the habitations that were found there, and destroyed them utterly unto this day, and dwelt in their rooms: because there was pasture there for their flocks.
verses.bsb: These who were noted by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah. They attacked the Hamites and Meunites there in their dwellings, devoting them to destruction even to this day. Then they settled in their place, because there was pasture for their flocks.

verses.kjv: And some of them, even of the sons of Simeon, five hundred men, went to mount Seir, having for their captains Pelatiah, and Neariah, and Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sons of Ishi.
verses.bsb: And five hundred of these Simeonites led by Pelatiah, Neariah, Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sons of Ishi, went to Mount Seir

verses.kjv: And they smote the rest of the Amalekites that were escaped, and dwelt there unto this day.
verses.bsb: and struck down the remnant of the Amalekites who had escaped. And they have lived there to this day.

verses.kjv: NOW the sons of Reuben the firstborn of Israel, (for he was the firstborn; but, forasmuch as he defiled his father’s bed, his birthright was given unto the sons of Joseph the son of Israel: and the genealogy is not to be reckoned after the birthright.
verses.bsb: These were the sons of Reuben the firstborn of Israel. Though he was the firstborn, his birthright was given to the sons of Joseph son of Israel, because Reuben defiled his father’s bed. So he is not reckoned according to birthright.

verses.kjv: For Judah prevailed above his brethren, and of him came the chief ruler; but the birthright was Joseph’s:)
verses.bsb: And though Judah prevailed over his brothers and a ruler came from him, the birthright belonged to Joseph.

verses.kjv: The sons, I say, of Reuben the firstborn of Israel were, Hanoch, and Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.
verses.bsb: The sons of Reuben, the firstborn of Israel:  Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.

verses.kjv: The sons of Joel; Shemaiah his son, Gog his son, Shimei his son,
verses.bsb: The descendants of Joel:

verses.kjv: Micah his son, Reaia his son, Baal his son,
verses.bsb: Shemaiah his son, Gog his son, Shimei his son, Micah his son, Reaiah his son, Baal his son,

verses.kjv: Beerah his son, whom Tilgath-pilneser king of Assyria carried away captive: he was prince of the Reubenites.
verses.bsb: and Beerah his son, whom Tiglath-pileser king of Assyria carried into exile.

verses.kjv: And his brethren by their families, when the genealogy of their generations was reckoned, were the chief, Jeiel, and Zechariah,
verses.bsb: Beerah was a leader of the Reubenites. His relatives by their clans are recorded in their genealogy:

verses.kjv: And Bela the son of Azaz, the son of Shema, the son of Joel, who dwelt in Aroer, even unto Nebo and Baal-meon:
verses.bsb: Jeiel the chief, Zechariah, and Bela son of Azaz, the son of Shema, the son of Joel. They settled in Aroer and as far as Nebo and Baal-meon.

verses.kjv: And eastward he inhabited unto the entering in of the wilderness from the river Euphrates: because their cattle were multiplied in the land of Gilead.
verses.bsb: They also settled in the east as far as the edge of the desert that extends to the Euphrates River, because their livestock had increased in the land of Gilead.

verses.kjv: And in the days of Saul they made war with the Hagarites, who fell by their hand: and they dwelt in their tents throughout all the east land of Gilead.
verses.bsb: During the days of Saul they waged war against the Hagrites, who were defeated at their hands, and they occupied the homes of the Hagrites throughout the region east of Gilead.

verses.kjv: ¶ And the children of Gad dwelt over against them, in the land of Bashan unto Salchah:
verses.bsb: The descendants of Gad lived next to the Reubenites in the land of Bashan, as far as Salecah:

verses.kjv: Joel the chief, and Shapham the next, and Jaanai, and Shaphat in Bashan.
verses.bsb: Joel was the chief, Shapham the second, then Jaanai and Shaphat, who lived in Bashan.

verses.kjv: And their brethren of the house of their fathers were, Michael, and Meshullam, and Sheba, and Jorai, and Jachan, and Zia, and Heber, seven.
verses.bsb: Their kinsmen by families were Michael, Meshullam, Sheba, Jorai, Jacan, Zia, and Eber—seven in all.

verses.kjv: These are the children of Abihail the son of Huri, the son of Jaroah, the son of Gilead, the son of Michael, the son of Jeshishai, the son of Jahdo, the son of Buz;
verses.bsb: These were the sons of Abihail son of Huri, the son of Jaroah, the son of Gilead, the son of Michael, the son of Jeshishai, the son of Jahdo, the son of Buz.

verses.kjv: Ahi the son of Abdiel, the son of Guni, chief of the house of their fathers.
verses.bsb: Ahi son of Abdiel, the son of Guni, was head of their family.

verses.kjv: And they dwelt in Gilead in Bashan, and in her towns, and in all the suburbs of Sharon, upon their borders.
verses.bsb: They lived in Gilead, in Bashan and its towns, and throughout the pasturelands of Sharon.

verses.kjv: All these were reckoned by genealogies in the days of Jotham king of Judah, and in the days of Jeroboam king of Israel.
verses.bsb: All of them were reckoned in the genealogies during the reigns of Jotham king of Judah and Jeroboam king of Israel.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Reuben, and the Gadites, and half the tribe of Manasseh, of valiant men, men able to bear buckler and sword, and to shoot with bow, and skilful in war, were four and forty thousand seven hundred and threescore, that went out to the war.
verses.bsb: The Reubenites, the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh had 44,760 warriors—valiant men who carried the shield and sword, drew the bow, and were trained for battle.

verses.kjv: And they made war with the Hagarites, with Jetur, and Nephish, and Nodab.
verses.bsb: They waged war against the Hagrites, as well as Jetur, Naphish, and Nodab.

verses.kjv: And they were helped against them, and the Hagarites were delivered into their hand, and all that were with them: for they cried to God in the battle, and he was intreated of them; because they put their trust in him.
verses.bsb: And because they cried out to God in battle, they were helped against their enemies, and the Hagrites and all their allies were delivered into their hands. Because they put their trust in God, He answered their prayers.

verses.kjv: And they took away their cattle; of their camels fifty thousand, and of sheep two hundred and fifty thousand, and of asses two thousand, and of men an hundred thousand.
verses.bsb: They seized the livestock of the Hagrites—50,000 camels, 250,000 sheep, and 2,000 donkeys. They also took 100,000 captives,

verses.kjv: For there fell down many slain, because the war was of God. And they dwelt in their steads until the captivity.
verses.bsb: and many others fell slain, because the battle belonged to God. And they occupied the land until the exile.

verses.kjv: ¶ And the children of the half tribe of Manasseh dwelt in the land: they increased from Bashan unto Baal-hermon and Senir, and unto mount Hermon.
verses.bsb: Now the people of the half-tribe of Manasseh were numerous. They settled in the land from Bashan to Baal-hermon (that is, Senir, also known as Mount Hermon).

verses.kjv: And these were the heads of the house of their fathers, even Epher, and Ishi, and Eliel, and Azriel, and Jeremiah, and Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty men of valour, famous men, and heads of the house of their fathers.
verses.bsb: These were the heads of their families:  Epher, Ishi, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremiah, Hodaviah, and Jahdiel.

verses.kjv: ¶ And they transgressed against the God of their fathers, and went a whoring after the gods of the people of the land, whom God destroyed before them.
verses.bsb: They were mighty men of valor, famous men, and heads of their families. But they were unfaithful to the God of their fathers, and they prostituted themselves with the gods of the peoples of the land, whom God had destroyed before them.

verses.kjv: And the God of Israel stirred up the spirit of Pul king of Assyria, and the spirit of Tilgath-pilneser king of Assyria, and he carried them away, even the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasseh, and brought them unto Halah, and Habor, and Hara, and to the river Gozan, unto this day.
verses.bsb: So the God of Israel stirred up the spirit of Pul king of Assyria (that is, Tiglath-pileser king of Assyria) to take the Reubenites, the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh into exile. And he brought them to Halah, Habor, Hara, and the river of Gozan, where they remain to this day.

verses.kjv: THE sons of Levi; Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.
verses.bsb: The sons of Levi:  Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Kohath; Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
verses.bsb: The sons of Kohath:   Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel.

verses.kjv: And the children of Amram; Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam. The sons also of Aaron; Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
verses.bsb: The children of Amram:   Aaron, Moses, and Miriam.   The sons of Aaron:   Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

verses.kjv: ¶ Eleazar begat Phinehas, Phinehas begat Abishua,
verses.bsb: Eleazar was the father of Phinehas,   Phinehas was the father of Abishua,

verses.kjv: And Abishua begat Bukki, and Bukki begat Uzzi,
verses.bsb: Abishua was the father of Bukki,   Bukki was the father of Uzzi,

verses.kjv: And Uzzi begat Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begat Meraioth,
verses.bsb: Uzzi was the father of Zerahiah,   Zerahiah was the father of Meraioth,

verses.kjv: Meraioth begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,
verses.bsb: Meraioth was the father of Amariah,   Amariah was the father of Ahitub,

verses.kjv: And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Ahimaaz,
verses.bsb: Ahitub was the father of Zadok,   Zadok was the father of Ahimaaz,

verses.kjv: And Ahimaaz begat Azariah, and Azariah begat Johanan,
verses.bsb: Ahimaaz was the father of Azariah,   Azariah was the father of Johanan,

verses.kjv: And Johanan begat Azariah, (he it is that executed the priest’s office in the temple that Solomon built in Jerusalem:)
verses.bsb: Johanan was the father of Azariah, who served as priest in the temple that Solomon built in Jerusalem,

verses.kjv: And Azariah begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,
verses.bsb: Azariah was the father of Amariah,   Amariah was the father of Ahitub,

verses.kjv: And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Shallum,
verses.bsb: Ahitub was the father of Zadok,   Zadok was the father of Shallum,

verses.kjv: And Shallum begat Hilkiah, and Hilkiah begat Azariah,
verses.bsb: Shallum was the father of Hilkiah,   Hilkiah was the father of Azariah,

verses.kjv: And Azariah begat Seraiah, and Seraiah begat Jehozadak,
verses.bsb: Azariah was the father of Seraiah,   and Seraiah was the father of Jehozadak.

verses.kjv: And Jehozadak went into captivity, when the Lord carried away Judah and Jerusalem by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.
verses.bsb: Jehozadak went into captivity when the LORD sent Judah and Jerusalem into exile by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Levi; Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.
verses.bsb: The sons of Levi:  Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.

verses.kjv: And these be the names of the sons of Gershom; Libni, and Shimei.
verses.bsb: These are the names of the sons of Gershom:   Libni and Shimei.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Kohath were, Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
verses.bsb: The sons of Kohath:   Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel.

verses.kjv: The sons of Merari; Mahli, and Mushi. And these are the families of the Levites according to their fathers.
verses.bsb: The sons of Merari:   Mahli and Mushi.   These are the clans of the Levites listed according to their fathers:

verses.kjv: Of Gershom; Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son,
verses.bsb: Of Gershom:

verses.kjv: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeaterai his son.
verses.bsb: Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son, Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, and Jeatherai his son.

verses.kjv: The sons of Kohath; Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son,
verses.bsb: The descendants of Kohath:

verses.kjv: Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, and Assir his son,
verses.bsb: Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son, Elkanah his son, Ebiasaph his son, Assir his son,

verses.kjv: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.
verses.bsb: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Elkanah; Amasai, and Ahimoth.
verses.bsb: The descendants of Elkanah:

verses.kjv: As for Elkanah: the sons of Elkanah; Zophai his son, and Nahath his son,
verses.bsb: Amasai, Ahimoth, Elkanah his son, Zophai his son, Nahath his son,

verses.kjv: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.
verses.bsb: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, and Elkanah his son.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Samuel; the firstborn Vashni, and Abiah.
verses.bsb: The sons of Samuel:   Joel his firstborn and Abijah his second son.

verses.kjv: The sons of Merari; Mahli, Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzza his son,
verses.bsb: The descendants of Merari:

verses.kjv: Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, Asaiah his son.
verses.bsb: Mahli, Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzzah his son, Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, and Asaiah his son.

verses.kjv: And these are they whom David set over the service of song in the house of the Lord, after that the ark had rest.
verses.bsb: These are the men David put in charge of the music in the house of the LORD after the ark rested there.

verses.kjv: And they ministered before the dwelling place of the tabernacle of the congregation with singing, until Solomon had built the house of the Lord in Jerusalem: and then they waited on their office according to their order.
verses.bsb: They ministered with song before the tabernacle, the Tent of Meeting, until Solomon built the house of the LORD in Jerusalem. And they performed their duties according to the regulations given them.

verses.kjv: And these are they that waited with their children. Of the sons of the Kohathites: Heman a singer, the son of Joel, the son of Shemuel,
verses.bsb: These are the men who served, together with their sons.  From the Kohathites:

verses.kjv: The son of Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Toah,
verses.bsb: Heman the singer, the son of Joel, the son of Samuel, the son of Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Toah,

verses.kjv: The son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai,
verses.bsb: the son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai,

verses.kjv: The son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah,
verses.bsb: the son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah,

verses.kjv: The son of Tahath, the son of Assir, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah,
verses.bsb: the son of Tahath, the son of Assir, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah,

verses.kjv: The son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.
verses.bsb: the son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.

verses.kjv: And his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand, even Asaph the son of Berachiah, the son of Shimea,
verses.bsb: Heman’s kinsman was Asaph, who served at his right hand:

verses.kjv: The son of Michael, the son of Baaseiah, the son of Malchiah,
verses.bsb: Asaph the son of Berechiah, the son of Shimea, the son of Michael, the son of Baaseiah, the son of Malchijah,

verses.kjv: The son of Ethni, the son of Zerah, the son of Adaiah,
verses.bsb: the son of Ethni, the son of Zerah, the son of Adaiah,

verses.kjv: The son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei,
verses.bsb: the son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei,

verses.kjv: The son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.
verses.bsb: the son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.

verses.kjv: And their brethren the sons of Merari stood on the left hand: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch,
verses.bsb: On the left were their kinsmen, the sons of Merari:

verses.kjv: The son of Hashabiah, the son of Amaziah, the son of Hilkiah,
verses.bsb: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch, the son of Hashabiah, the son of Amaziah, the son of Hilkiah,

verses.kjv: The son of Amzi, the son of Bani, the son of Shamer,
verses.bsb: the son of Amzi, the son of Bani, the son of Shemer,

verses.kjv: The son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.
verses.bsb: the son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.

verses.kjv: Their brethren also the Levites were appointed unto all manner of service of the tabernacle of the house of God.
verses.bsb: Their fellow Levites were assigned to every kind of service of the tabernacle, the house of God.

verses.kjv: ¶ But Aaron and his sons offered upon the altar of the burnt offering, and on the altar of incense, and were appointed for all the work of the place most holy, and to make an atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.
verses.bsb: But Aaron and his sons did all the work of the Most Holy Place. They presented the offerings on the altar of burnt offering and on the altar of incense to make atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.

verses.kjv: And these are the sons of Aaron; Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son,
verses.bsb: These were the descendants of Aaron:

verses.kjv: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,
verses.bsb: Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son, Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,

verses.kjv: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,
verses.bsb: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,

verses.kjv: Zadok his son, Ahimaaz his son.
verses.bsb: Zadok his son, and Ahimaaz his son.

verses.kjv: ¶ Now these are their dwelling places throughout their castles in their coasts, of the sons of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites: for theirs was the lot.
verses.bsb: Now these were the territories assigned to the descendants of Aaron from the Kohathite clan for their settlements, because the first lot fell to them:

verses.kjv: And they gave them Hebron in the land of Judah, and the suburbs thereof round about it.
verses.bsb: They were given Hebron in the land of Judah and its surrounding pasturelands.

verses.kjv: But the fields of the city, and the villages thereof, they gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh.
verses.bsb: But the fields and villages around the city were given to Caleb son of Jephunneh.

verses.kjv: And to the sons of Aaron they gave the cities of Judah, namely, Hebron, the city of refuge, and Libnah with her suburbs, and Jattir, and Eshtemoa, with their suburbs,
verses.bsb: So the descendants of Aaron were given Hebron (a city of refuge), Libnah, Jattir, Eshtemoa,

verses.kjv: And Hilen with her suburbs, Debir with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: Hilen, Debir,

verses.kjv: And Ashan with her suburbs, and Beth-shemesh with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: Ashan, Juttah, and Beth-shemesh, together with their pasturelands.

verses.kjv: And out of the tribe of Benjamin; Geba with her suburbs, and Alemeth with her suburbs, and Anathoth with her suburbs. All their cities throughout their families were thirteen cities.
verses.bsb: And from the tribe of Benjamin they were given Gibeon, Geba, Alemeth, and Anathoth, together with their pasturelands. So they had thirteen cities in all among their families.

verses.kjv: And unto the sons of Kohath, which were left of the family of that tribe, were cities given out of the half tribe, namely, out of the half tribe of Manasseh, by lot, ten cities.
verses.bsb: To the rest of the Kohathites, ten cities were allotted from the half-tribe of Manasseh.

verses.kjv: And to the sons of Gershom throughout their families out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.
verses.bsb: The Gershomites, according to their clans, were allotted thirteen cities from the tribes of Issachar, Asher, Naphtali, and Manasseh in Bashan.

verses.kjv: Unto the sons of Merari were given by lot, throughout their families, out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.
verses.bsb: The Merarites, according to their families, were allotted twelve cities from the tribes of Reuben, Gad, and Zebulun.

verses.kjv: And the children of Israel gave to the Levites these cities with their suburbs.
verses.bsb: So the Israelites gave to the Levites these cities and their pasturelands.

verses.kjv: And they gave by lot out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities, which are called by their names.
verses.bsb: They assigned by lot the cities named above from the tribes of Judah, Simeon, and Benjamin.

verses.kjv: And the residue of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their coasts out of the tribe of Ephraim.
verses.bsb: And some of the clans of the Kohathites were given cities from the tribe of Ephraim for their territory:

verses.kjv: And they gave unto them, of the cities of refuge, Shechem in mount Ephraim with her suburbs; they gave also Gezer with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: They were given Shechem (a city of refuge) with its pasturelands in the hill country of Ephraim, and Gezer,

verses.kjv: And Jokmeam with her suburbs, and Beth-horon with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: Jokmeam, Beth-horon,

verses.kjv: And Aijalon with her suburbs, and Gath-rimmon with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: Aijalon, and Gath-rimmon, together with their pasturelands.

verses.kjv: And out of the half tribe of Manasseh; Aner with her suburbs, and Bileam with her suburbs, for the family of the remnant of the sons of Kohath.
verses.bsb: And from the half-tribe of Manasseh the remaining clans of the Kohathites were given Aner and Bileam, together with their pasturelands.

verses.kjv: Unto the sons of Gershom were given out of the family of the half tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with her suburbs, and Ashtaroth with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: The Gershomites received the following:  From the clan of the half-tribe of Manasseh they were given Golan in Bashan and also Ashtaroth, together with their pasturelands.

verses.kjv: And out of the tribe of Issachar; Kedesh with her suburbs, Daberath with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: From the tribe of Issachar they were given Kedesh, Daberath,

verses.kjv: And Ramoth with her suburbs, and Anem with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: Ramoth, and Anem, together with their pasturelands.

verses.kjv: And out of the tribe of Asher; Mashal with her suburbs, and Abdon with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: From the tribe of Asher they were given Mashal, Abdon,

verses.kjv: And Hukok with her suburbs, and Rehob with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: Hukok, and Rehob, together with their pasturelands.

verses.kjv: And out of the tribe of Naphtali; Kedesh in Galilee with her suburbs, and Hammon with her suburbs, and Kirjathaim with her suburbs.
verses.bsb: And from the tribe of Naphtali they were given Kedesh in Galilee, Hammon, and Kiriathaim, together with their pasturelands.

verses.kjv: Unto the rest of the children of Merari were given out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmon with her suburbs, Tabor with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: The Merarites (the rest of the Levites) received the following:  From the tribe of Zebulun they were given Rimmono and Tabor, together with their pasturelands.

verses.kjv: And on the other side Jordan by Jericho, on the east side of Jordan, were given them out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wilderness with her suburbs, and Jahzah with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: From the tribe of Reuben east of the Jordan opposite Jericho they were given Bezer in the wilderness, Jahzah,

verses.kjv: Kedemoth also with her suburbs, and Mephaath with her suburbs:
verses.bsb: Kedemoth, and Mephaath, together with their pasturelands.

verses.kjv: And out of the tribe of Gad; Ramoth in Gilead with her suburbs, and Mahanaim with her suburbs,
verses.bsb: And from the tribe of Gad they were given Ramoth in Gilead, Mahanaim,

verses.kjv: And Heshbon with her suburbs, and Jazer with her suburbs.
verses.bsb: Heshbon, and Jazer, together with their pasturelands.

verses.kjv: NOW the sons of Issachar were, Tola, and Puah, Jashub, and Shimron, four.
verses.bsb: The sons of Issachar:  Tola, Puah, Jashub, and Shimron—four in all.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Tola; Uzzi, and Rephaiah, and Jeriel, and Jahmai, and Jibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their father’s house, to wit, of Tola: they were valiant men of might in their generations; whose number was in the days of David two and twenty thousand and six hundred.
verses.bsb: The sons of Tola:   Uzzi, Rephaiah, Jeriel, Jahmai, Ibsam, and Shemuel, the heads of their families. In the days of David, 22,600 descendants of Tola were numbered in their genealogies as mighty men of valor.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Uzzi; Izrahiah: and the sons of Izrahiah; Michael, and Obadiah, and Joel, Ishiah, five: all of them chief men.
verses.bsb: The son of Uzzi:   Izrahiah.   The sons of Izrahiah:

verses.kjv: And with them, by their generations, after the house of their fathers, were bands of soldiers for war, six and thirty thousand men: for they had many wives and sons.
verses.bsb: Michael, Obadiah, Joel, and Isshiah. All five of them were chiefs. In addition to them, according to their genealogy, they had 36,000 troops for battle, for they had many wives and children.

verses.kjv: And their brethren among all the families of Issachar were valiant men of might, reckoned in all by their genealogies fourscore and seven thousand.
verses.bsb: Their kinsmen belonging to all the families of Issachar who were mighty men of valor totaled 87,000, as listed in their genealogies.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Benjamin; Bela, and Becher, and Jediael, three.
verses.bsb: The three sons of Benjamin:  Bela, Becher, and Jediael.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Bela; Ezbon, and Uzzi, and Uzziel, and Jerimoth, and Iri, five; heads of the house of their fathers, mighty men of valour; and were reckoned by their genealogies twenty and two thousand and thirty and four.
verses.bsb: The sons of Bela:   Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth, and Iri, heads of their families—five in all. There were 22,034 mighty men of valor listed in their genealogies.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Becher; Zemira, and Joash, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Omri, and Jerimoth, and Abiah, and Anathoth, and Alameth. All these are the sons of Becher.
verses.bsb: The sons of Becher:

verses.kjv: And the number of them, after their genealogy by their generations, heads of the house of their fathers, mighty men of valour, was twenty thousand and two hundred.
verses.bsb: Zemirah, Joash, Eliezer, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremoth, Abijah, Anathoth, and Alemeth; all these were Becher’s sons. Their genealogies were recorded according to the heads of their families—20,200 mighty men of valor.

verses.kjv: The sons also of Jediael; Bilhan: and the sons of Bilhan; Jeush, and Benjamin, and Ehud, and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tharshish, and Ahishahar.
verses.bsb: The son of Jediael:   Bilhan.   The sons of Bilhan:

verses.kjv: All these the sons of Jediael, by the heads of their fathers, mighty men of valour, were seventeen thousand and two hundred soldiers, fit to go out for war and battle.
verses.bsb: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Chenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish, and Ahishahar. All these sons of Jediael were heads of their families, mighty men of valor; there were 17,200 fit for battle.

verses.kjv: Shuppim also, and Huppim, the children of Ir, and Hushim, the sons of Aher.
verses.bsb: The Shuppites and Huppites were descendants of Ir, and the Hushites were descendants of Aher.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Naphtali; Jahziel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shallum, the sons of Bilhah.
verses.bsb: The sons of Naphtali:  Jahziel, Guni, Jezer, and Shallum—the descendants of Bilhah.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Manasseh; Ashriel, whom she bare: (but his concubine the Aramitess bare Machir the father of Gilead:
verses.bsb: The descendants of Manasseh:  Through his Aramean concubine, Asriel, as well as Machir the father of Gilead.

verses.kjv: And Machir took to wife the sister of Huppim and Shuppim, whose sister’s name was Maachah;) and the name of the second was Zelophehad: and Zelophehad had daughters.
verses.bsb: Machir took a wife from among the Huppites and Shuppites. The name of his sister was Maacah.   Another descendant was named Zelophehad, who had only daughters.

verses.kjv: And Maachah the wife of Machir bare a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.
verses.bsb: Machir’s wife Maacah gave birth to a son, and she named him Peresh. His brother was named Sheresh, and his sons were Ulam and Rekem.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Ulam; Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.
verses.bsb: The son of Ulam:   Bedan.

verses.kjv: And his sister Hammoleketh bare Ishod, and Abiezer, and Mahalah.
verses.bsb: These were the sons of Gilead son of Machir, the son of Manasseh. His sister Hammolecheth gave birth to Ishhod, Abiezer, and Mahlah.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Shemida were, Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.
verses.bsb: And these were the sons of Shemida:   Ahian, Shechem, Likhi, and Aniam.

verses.kjv: ¶ And the sons of Ephraim; Shuthelah, and Bered his son, and Tahath his son, and Eladah his son, and Tahath his son,
verses.bsb: The descendants of Ephraim:

verses.kjv: ¶ And Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son, and Ezer, and Elead, whom the men of Gath that were born in that land slew, because they came down to take away their cattle.
verses.bsb: Shuthelah, Bered his son, Tahath his son, Eleadah his son, Tahath his son, Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son.   Ezer and Elead were killed by the natives of Gath, because they went down to steal their livestock.

verses.kjv: And Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brethren came to comfort him.
verses.bsb: Their father Ephraim mourned for many days, and his relatives came to comfort him.

verses.kjv: ¶ And when he went in to his wife, she conceived, and bare a son, and he called his name Beriah, because it went evil with his house.
verses.bsb: And again he slept with his wife, and she conceived and gave birth to a son. So he named him Beriah, because tragedy had come upon his house.

verses.kjv: (And his daughter was Sherah, who built Beth-horon the nether, and the upper, and Uzzen-sherah.)
verses.bsb: His daughter was Sheerah, who built Lower and Upper Beth-horon, as well as Uzzen-sheerah.

verses.kjv: And Rephah was his son, also Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son,
verses.bsb: Additionally, Rephah was his son, Resheph his son, Telah his son, Tahan his son,

verses.kjv: Laadan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,
verses.bsb: Ladan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,

verses.kjv: Non his son, Jehoshua his son.
verses.bsb: Nun his son, and Joshua his son.

verses.kjv: ¶ And their possessions and habitations were, Beth-el and the towns thereof, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer, with the towns thereof; Shechem also and the towns thereof, unto Gaza and the towns thereof:
verses.bsb: Their holdings and settlements included Bethel and its villages, Naaran to the east, Gezer and its villages to the west, and Shechem and its villages as far as Ayyah and its villages.

verses.kjv: And by the borders of the children of Manasseh, Beth-shean and her towns, Taanach and her towns, Megiddo and her towns, Dor and her towns. In these dwelt the children of Joseph the son of Israel.
verses.bsb: And along the borders of Manasseh were Beth-shean, Taanach, Megiddo, and Dor, together with their villages. The descendants of Joseph son of Israel lived in these towns.

verses.kjv: ¶ The sons of Asher; Imnah, and Isuah, and Ishuai, and Beriah, and Serah their sister.
verses.bsb: The children of Asher:  Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah, and their sister Serah.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Beriah; Heber, and Malchiel, who is the father of Birzavith.
verses.bsb: The sons of Beriah:   Heber, as well as Malchiel, who was the father of Birzaith.

verses.kjv: And Heber begat Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shua their sister.
verses.bsb: Heber was the father of Japhlet, Shomer, and Hotham, and of their sister Shua.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Japhlet; Pasach, and Bimhal, and Ashvath. These are the children of Japhlet.
verses.bsb: The sons of Japhlet:   Pasach, Bimhal, and Ashvath. These were Japhlet’s sons.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Shamer; Ahi, and Rohgah, Jehubbah, and Aram.
verses.bsb: The sons of Shemer:   Ahi, Rohgah, Hubbah, and Aram.

verses.kjv: And the sons of his brother Helem; Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.
verses.bsb: The sons of his brother Helem:   Zophah, Imna, Shelesh, and Amal.

verses.kjv: The sons of Zophah; Suah, and Harnepher, and Shual, and Beri, and Imrah,
verses.bsb: The sons of Zophah:

verses.kjv: Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilshah, and Ithran, and Beera.
verses.bsb: Suah, Harnepher, Shual, Beri, Imrah, Bezer, Hod, Shamma, Shilshah, Ithran, and Beera.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Jether; Jephunneh, and Pispah, and Ara.
verses.bsb: The sons of Jether:   Jephunneh, Pispa, and Ara.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Ulla; Arah, and Haniel, and Rezia.
verses.bsb: The sons of Ulla:   Arah, Hanniel, and Rizia.

verses.kjv: All these were the children of Asher, heads of their father’s house, choice and mighty men of valour, chief of the princes. And the number throughout the genealogy of them that were apt to the war and to battle was twenty and six thousand men.
verses.bsb: All these were the descendants of Asher—heads of their families, choice and mighty men of valor, and chiefs among the leaders. The number of men fit for battle, recorded in their genealogies, was 26,000.

verses.kjv: NOW Benjamin begat Bela his firstborn, Ashbel the second, and Aharah the third,
verses.bsb: Benjamin was the father of Bela, his firstborn; Ashbel was the second born, Aharah the third,

verses.kjv: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.
verses.bsb: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Bela were, Addar, and Gera, and Abihud,
verses.bsb: The sons of Bela:

verses.kjv: And Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah,
verses.bsb: Addar, Gera, Abihud, Abishua, Naaman, Ahoah,

verses.kjv: And Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.
verses.bsb: Gera, Shephuphan, and Huram.

verses.kjv: And these are the sons of Ehud: these are the heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Geba, and they removed them to Manahath:
verses.bsb: These were the descendants of Ehud who were the heads of the families living in Geba and were exiled to Manahath:

verses.kjv: And Naaman, and Ahiah, and Gera, he removed them, and begat Uzza, and Ahihud.
verses.bsb: Naaman, Ahijah, and Gera, who carried them into exile and who was the father of Uzza and Ahihud.

verses.kjv: And Shaharaim begat children in the country of Moab, after he had sent them away; Hushim and Baara were his wives.
verses.bsb: Shaharaim had sons in the country of Moab after he had divorced his wives Hushim and Baara.

verses.kjv: And he begat of Hodesh his wife, Jobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcham,
verses.bsb: His sons by his wife Hodesh:

verses.kjv: And Jeuz, and Shachia, and Mirma. These were his sons, heads of the fathers.
verses.bsb: Jobab, Zibia, Mesha, Malcam, Jeuz, Sachia, and Mirmah. These were his sons, heads of families.

verses.kjv: And of Hushim he begat Abitub, and Elpaal.
verses.bsb: He also had sons by Hushim:   Abitub and Elpaal.

verses.kjv: The sons of Elpaal; Eber, and Misham, and Shamed, who built Ono, and Lod, with the towns thereof:
verses.bsb: The sons of Elpaal:

verses.kjv: Beriah also, and Shema, who were heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who drove away the inhabitants of Gath:
verses.bsb: Eber, Misham, Shemed (who built Ono and Lod with its villages), and Beriah and Shema (who were the heads of families of the inhabitants of Aijalon and who drove out the inhabitants of Gath).

verses.kjv: And Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth,
verses.bsb: Ahio, Shashak, Jeremoth,

verses.kjv: And Zebadiah, and Arad, and Ader,
verses.bsb: Zebadiah, Arad, Eder,

verses.kjv: And Michael, and Ispah, and Joha, the sons of Beriah;
verses.bsb: Michael, Ishpah, and Joha were the sons of Beriah.

verses.kjv: And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hezeki, and Heber,
verses.bsb: Zebadiah, Meshullam, Hizki, Heber,

verses.kjv: Ishmerai also, and Jezliah, and Jobab, the sons of Elpaal;
verses.bsb: Ishmerai, Izliah, and Jobab were the sons of Elpaal.

verses.kjv: And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi,
verses.bsb: Jakim, Zichri, Zabdi,

verses.kjv: And Elienai, and Zilthai, and Eliel,
verses.bsb: Elienai, Zillethai, Eliel,

verses.kjv: And Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, the sons of Shimhi;
verses.bsb: Adaiah, Beraiah, and Shimrath were the sons of Shimei.

verses.kjv: And Ishpan, and Heber, and Eliel,
verses.bsb: Ishpan, Eber, Eliel,

verses.kjv: And Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan,
verses.bsb: Abdon, Zichri, Hanan,

verses.kjv: And Hananiah, and Elam, and Antothijah,
verses.bsb: Hananiah, Elam, Anthothijah,

verses.kjv: And Iphedeiah, and Penuel, the sons of Shashak;
verses.bsb: Iphdeiah, and Penuel were the sons of Shashak.

verses.kjv: And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah,
verses.bsb: Shamsherai, Shehariah, Athaliah,

verses.kjv: And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.
verses.bsb: Jaareshiah, Elijah, and Zichri were the sons of Jeroham.

verses.kjv: These were heads of the fathers, by their generations, chief men. These dwelt in Jerusalem.
verses.bsb: All these were heads of families, the chiefs according to their genealogies, and they lived in Jerusalem.

verses.kjv: And at Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon; whose wife’s name was Maachah:
verses.bsb: Jeiel the father of Gibeon lived in Gibeon. His wife’s name was Maacah,

verses.kjv: And his firstborn son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Nadab,
verses.bsb: and Abdon was his firstborn son, then Zur, Kish, Baal, Nadab,

verses.kjv: And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zacher.
verses.bsb: Gedor, Ahio, Zecher,

verses.kjv: And Mikloth begat Shimeah. And these also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against them.
verses.bsb: and Mikloth, who was the father of Shimeah. These also lived alongside their relatives in Jerusalem.

verses.kjv: ¶ And Ner begat Kish, and Kish begat Saul, and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Esh-baal.
verses.bsb: Ner was the father of Kish, Kish was the father of Saul, and Saul was the father of Jonathan, Malchishua, Abinadab, and Esh-baal.

verses.kjv: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal begat Micah.
verses.bsb: The son of Jonathan:   Merib-baal, and Merib-baal was the father of Micah.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Micah were, Pithon, and Melech, and Tarea, and Ahaz.
verses.bsb: The sons of Micah:   Pithon, Melech, Tarea, and Ahaz.

verses.kjv: And Ahaz begat Jehoadah; and Jehoadah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza,
verses.bsb: Ahaz was the father of Jehoaddah, Jehoaddah was the father of Alemeth, Azmaveth, and Zimri, and Zimri was the father of Moza.

verses.kjv: And Moza begat Binea: Rapha was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son:
verses.bsb: Moza was the father of Binea. Raphah was his son, Eleasah his son, and Azel his son.

verses.kjv: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these, Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.
verses.bsb: Azel had six sons, and these were their names:   Azrikam, Bocheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.

verses.kjv: And the sons of Eshek his brother were, Ulam his firstborn, Jehush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
verses.bsb: The sons of his brother Eshek:

verses.kjv: And the sons of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers, and had many sons, and sons’ sons, an hundred and fifty. All these are of the sons of Benjamin.
verses.bsb: Ulam was his firstborn, Jeush second, and Eliphelet third. The sons of Ulam were mighty men of valor, archers, and they had many sons and grandsons—150 in all.   All these were the descendants of Benjamin.

verses.kjv: SO all Israel were reckoned by genealogies; and, behold, they were written in the book of the kings of Israel and Judah, who were carried away to Babylon for their transgression.
verses.bsb: So all Israel was recorded in the genealogies written in the Book of the Kings of Israel. But Judah was exiled to Babylon because of their unfaithfulness.

verses.kjv: ¶ Now the first inhabitants that dwelt in their possessions in their cities were, the Israelites, the priests, Levites, and the Nethinims.
verses.bsb: Now the first to resettle their own property in their cities were Israelites, priests, Levites, and temple servants.

verses.kjv: And in Jerusalem dwelt of the children of Judah, and of the children of Benjamin, and of the children of Ephraim, and Manasseh;
verses.bsb: These were some of the descendants of Judah, Benjamin, Ephraim, and Manasseh who lived in Jerusalem:

verses.kjv: Uthai the son of Ammihud, the son of Omri, the son of Imri, the son of Bani, of the children of Pharez the son of Judah.
verses.bsb: Uthai son of Ammihud, the son of Omri, the son of Imri, the son of Bani, a descendant of Perez son of Judah.

verses.kjv: And of the Shilonites; Asaiah the firstborn, and his sons.
verses.bsb: From the Shilonites:   Asaiah the firstborn and his sons.

verses.kjv: And of the sons of Zerah; Jeuel, and their brethren, six hundred and ninety.
verses.bsb: From the Zerahites:   Jeuel and 690 relatives.

verses.kjv: And of the sons of Benjamin; Sallu the son of Meshullam, the son of Hodaviah, the son of Hasenuah,
verses.bsb: From the Benjamites:   Sallu son of Meshullam, the son of Hodaviah, the son of Hassenuah;

verses.kjv: And Ibneiah the son of Jeroham, and Elah the son of Uzzi, the son of Michri, and Meshullam the son of Shephathiah, the son of Reuel, the son of Ibnijah;
verses.bsb: Ibneiah son of Jeroham;   Elah son of Uzzi, the son of Michri;   Meshullam son of Shephatiah, the son of Reuel, the son of Ibnijah;

verses.kjv: And their brethren, according to their generations, nine hundred and fifty and six. All these men were chief of the fathers in the house of their fathers.
verses.bsb: and 956 of their relatives according to their genealogy. All these men were heads of their families.

verses.kjv: ¶ And of the priests; Jedaiah, and Jehoiarib, and Jachin,
verses.bsb: From the priests:   Jedaiah, Jehoiarib, and Jachin;

verses.kjv: And Azariah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house of God;
verses.bsb: Azariah son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the chief official of God’s temple;

verses.kjv: And Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashur, the son of Malchijah, and Maasiai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;
verses.bsb: Adaiah son of Jeroham, the son of Pashhur, the son of Malchijah;   Maasai son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;

verses.kjv: And their brethren, heads of the house of their fathers, a thousand and seven hundred and threescore; very able men for the work of the service of the house of God.
verses.bsb: and 1,760 of their relatives, the heads of their families, able men for the work of the service of the house of God.

verses.kjv: And of the Levites; Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;
verses.bsb: From the Levites:   Shemaiah son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, a descendant of Merari;

verses.kjv: And Bakbakkar, Heresh, and Galal, and Mattaniah the son of Micah, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph;
verses.bsb: Bakbakkar, Heresh, Galal, and Mattaniah son of Mica, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph;

verses.kjv: And Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun, and Berechiah the son of Asa, the son of Elkanah, that dwelt in the villages of the Netophathites.
verses.bsb: Obadiah son of Shemaiah, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun;   and Berechiah son of Asa, the son of Elkanah, who lived in the villages of the Netophathites.

verses.kjv: And the porters were, Shallum, and Akkub, and Talmon, and Ahiman, and their brethren: Shallum was the chief;
verses.bsb: These were the gatekeepers:   Shallum, Akkub, Talmon, Ahiman, and their relatives.

verses.kjv: Who hitherto waited in the king’s gate eastward: they were porters in the companies of the children of Levi.
verses.bsb: Shallum was their chief; he was previously stationed at the King’s Gate on the east side. These were the gatekeepers from the camp of the Levites.

verses.kjv: And Shallum the son of Kore, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah, and his brethren, of the house of his father, the Korahites, were over the work of the service, keepers of the gates of the tabernacle: and their fathers, being over the host of the Lord, were keepers of the entry.
verses.bsb: Shallum son of Kore, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah, and his relatives from the Korahites were assigned to guard the thresholds of the Tent, just as their fathers had been assigned to guard the entrance to the dwelling of the LORD.

verses.kjv: And Phinehas the son of Eleazar was the ruler over them in time past, and the Lord was with him.
verses.bsb: In earlier times Phinehas son of Eleazar had been in charge of the gatekeepers, and the LORD was with him.
